overall.description: A cinematic drive through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at dusk, featuring wet streets reflecting vibrant neon lights, towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and elevated highways. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcases dense urban architecture with a mix of covered walkways, open plazas, and multi-level road systems.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a city intersection with a yellow crosswalk, entering a covered pedestrian walkway with illuminated ceiling panels. The wet asphalt reflects the green neon lights from the building facade on the left. Pedestrians are visible crossing the street, and another vehicle drives alongside on the right.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a massive circular holographic tower with rotating advertisements. The vehicle curves right around a distinctive blue commercial building featuring large digital billboards. Palm trees line the street, and a pedestrian in a red jacket waits at the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with mega towers transitioning to elevated highway

multi-lane raised roadway with concrete guardrails and support pillars
concrete overpass with purple neon underlighting creating a canopy effect

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to showcase the immense scale of the mega-skyscrapers with their glass facades and vertical neon strips. A flying vehicle passes overhead against the darkening sky. The vehicle then transitions onto an elevated highway, passing under a concrete overpass illuminated with purple neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway through dense downtown with multiple overpasses

traffic light turns green, proceeding through intersection

segments.scene_description: Driving along the elevated highway through the dense downtown core, surrounded by towering buildings covered in neon signs and holographic advertisements. The vehicle approaches an intersection, stopping at a red traffic light suspended over the road. After the light turns green, the vehicle proceeds through the intersection, with other vehicles visible ahead and crossing from the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-drenched city center that transitions from enclosed pedestrian walkways to the expansive heights of an elevated highway. It begins at a city intersection, gliding across a yellow crosswalk and under the illuminated panels of a covered walkway where wet asphalt reflects vibrant green neon. As the vehicle emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a massive circular holographic tower and blue commercial buildings lined with palm trees. The camera then tilts upward to capture the immense scale of glass mega-skyscrapers and a passing flying vehicle before the path shifts onto an elevated highway beneath purple-lit concrete overpasses. Finally, the journey proceeds through the dense downtown core, weaving past towering holographic advertisements and stopping briefly at a suspended red light before accelerating back into the flow of urban traffic.
